inspection_first_screen_subtitle: Enter unipole details to start inspection
foundation_form_f1: 1. Are there any cracks in the concrete?
foundation_form_f2: 2. Is there any soil erosion at the foundation?
foundation_form_f4: 4. Is there any looseness in the anchor bolts?
foundation_form_f6: 6. Is the base plate properly seated?
foundation_form_f7: 7. Is there any gap in the base plate?
post_form_p3: 3. Is there any bend in the post?
post_form_p4: 4. Is there any crack in the welded joint?
post_form_p5: 5. Is there any damage in the welded joint?
post_form_p10: 10. Is there any looseness in the splice nuts?
adBoard_form_a2: 2. Is there any bend in the frame?
adBoard_form_a3: 3. Are the angle / pipe members strong?
adBoard_form_a8: 8. Is there any looseness in the support fasteners?
adBoard_form_a9: 9. Is there vibration due to wind?
adBoard_form_a10: 10. Is there water runoff / seepage on the structure?
safety_form_s2: 2. Are nearby trees touching the structure?
safety_form_s7: 7. Have repairs been carried out properly?
